title: New Ardenite SMP
description: A modpack for me and my friends. Adds Create, Adorn, MTR, and Ad Astra, plus a few other QOL mods like REI and Jade.
body:
A modpack based on Adrenaline for me and my friends.

This modpack is meant to be a tech-focused futuristic and a fantasy based pack, allowing the user to choose either high-tech or fantasy paths. There are no quests, so this is more of a kitchen-sink pack.

Some mods included are: Create, Minecraft Transit Railway, Paradise Lost (as of 1.0.3), Adorn, Ad Astra, and more. 

Mods needed to join the server:
- FTB Backups : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-backups-2
- FTB Chunks : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-chunks-fabric
- FTB Library : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric
- FTB Ranks : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ranks-fabric
- FTB Teams : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric
- FTB Ultimine : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ultimine-fabric

Mod Attributions :
- Macaw's Bridges - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges
- Macaw's Doors - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors
- Macaw's Fences and Walls - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls
- Macaw's Lights - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps
- Macaw's Furniture - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps
- Macaw's Paintings - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paintings
- Macaw's Paths and Pavings - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paths-and-pavings
- Macaw's Roofs - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs
- Macaw's Trapdoors - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors
- Macaw's Windows - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows
